about.title: About Lena
about.body: I'm Lena, a native Russian teacher from Moscow. For over 6 years I've been helping people from around the world discover Russian — not just as a language, but as a key to an incredible culture. I teach in Spanish and English, with patience, humor, and lots of coffee. ☕ I'm certified by the International Russian Language Centre and the creator of The Клуб, a living community of over 80 people who meet in Moscow to practice languages and make real friends.

items.name: Carlos M.
items.text: I started from scratch and in 3 months I could already ask for directions on the Moscow metro. Lena makes Russian feel less scary.

items.name: Sarah K.
items.text: The conversation club completely changed my experience in Moscow. I went from tourist to feeling at home.

items.name: Ana P.
items.text: The club took away my fear of speaking. I also met amazing people from all over the world. Totally recommended!

meta.title: Profe Lena · Russian Teacher in Moscow

schema.serviceDescription: Russian lessons for Spanish and English speakers. Online and in-person in Moscow.

faq.q1: Where can I find a Russian language teacher in Moscow who teaches in English?
faq.a1: Lena is a native Russian teacher in Moscow who teaches in both Spanish and English, online and in-person. She has over 6 years of experience and is certified by the International Russian Language Centre.
faq.q2: How can I prepare for the Russian language exam for the RVP or residence permit?
faq.a2: Lena offers a structured preparation course for the Russian language exam required for temporary residency (RVP) and permanent residence permit in Russia. Classes in Spanish and English for all levels.
faq.q3: How much does a Russian lesson with a native teacher in Moscow cost?
faq.a3: Lena offers 30-minute lessons, 1-hour lessons, and intensive 1.5–2 hour formats, plus group Language Parties. Message her on Telegram (@UlyaLena) for current pricing and a personalized plan.
faq.q4: Can I learn Russian from scratch with Lena?
faq.a4: Yes. Lena teaches from complete beginner to advanced level (A1–C1) in Spanish and English. Her lessons are personalized and adapted to each student's pace.
faq.a5: The Клуб is a language exchange community in Moscow with over 80 active members. They meet weekly at various locations around Moscow to practice Russian, Spanish, and English in small, dynamic groups.
